report.summary: Built two new learn guides: Solana Token Extensions (Token-2022) deep-dive and Real Yield in DeFi guide covering sustainable vs emission yields, both with full SEO metadata and internal linking.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Solana Token Extensions (Token-2022): Researched the 16+ extensions including confidential transfers (Twisted ElGamal + ZK proofs), transfer fees, interest-bearing tokens, permanent delegates, transfer hooks, non-transferable tokens, default account state, CPI guard, and metadata pointers. Key finding: ZK ElGamal program temporarily disabled on mainnet pending security audit. PYUSD is a major real-world adopter.

Real Yield vs Token Emissions in DeFi: Researched the maturation of DeFi from emission-driven yields to revenue-backed returns. Key protocols generating real yield in 2026: Aave ($500M+ annual revenue), Uniswap (largest DEX by volume), Lido ($30B+ TVL), Hyperliquid (HIP-1 buyback), MakerDAO/Sky (4-5% from RWA treasury allocation), GMX (30/70 fee split), Ethena (funding rate arbitrage), Pendle (yield trading fees).

sections.title: Content Created
items: Solana Token Extensions Guide 2026 — 2,800+ word intermediate/advanced learn guide covering Token-2022 architecture, 8 major extensions with use cases, real-world adoption (PYUSD, tokenized securities), limitations, and evaluation framework. Includes 6-item FAQ section.

Real Yield in DeFi Guide 2026 — 2,500+ word intermediate learn guide covering real yield vs emissions distinction, top 8 real yield protocols with revenue data, 5-step identification framework, emissions trap flywheel explanation, hybrid models (Curve, Aerodrome), and portfolio construction advice. Includes 6-item FAQ section.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Solana Token Extensions: Title 'Solana Token Extensions Guide 2026 — Token-2022 Explained | degen0x' (59 chars), target keyword 'solana token extensions', OpenGraph article type with publishedTime, 7 keyword variations, FAQ schema-ready content

Real Yield DeFi: Title 'Real Yield in DeFi Guide 2026 — Sustainable vs Emission Yields | degen0x' (64 chars), target keyword 'real yield defi', OpenGraph article type with publishedTime, 6 keyword variations, FAQ schema-ready content
Both pages include 5+ internal links to existing degen0x content (tools, ecosystem pages, related guides)
Both pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES in published-pages.ts (batch 14)
